'''vothanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phacolytic|phacolytic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phacolytic|phacolytic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vothanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vothanithi|vothanithi]] || [[word:vothaniji|vothaniji]] || [[word:vothanishi|vothanishi]] || [[word:vothaniki|vothaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vothanuthuthu|vothanuthuthu]] || [[word:vothanujuju|vothanujuju]] || [[word:vothanushushu|vothanushushu]] || [[word:vothanukuku|vothanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vothanuthu|vothanuthu]] || [[word:vothanuju|vothanuju]] || [[word:vothanushu|vothanushu]] || [[word:vothanuku|vothanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vothanufthuf|vothanufthuf]] || [[word:vothanufjuf|vothanufjuf]] || [[word:vothanufshuf|vothanufshuf]] || [[word:vothanufkuf|vothanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vothanethe|vothanethe]] || [[word:vothaneje|vothaneje]] || [[word:vothaneshe|vothaneshe]] || [[word:vothaneke|vothaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vothanothotho|vothanothotho]] || [[word:vothanojojo|vothanojojo]] || [[word:vothanoshosho|vothanoshosho]] || [[word:vothanokoko|vothanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vothanotho|vothanotho]] || [[word:vothanojo|vothanojo]] || [[word:vothanosho|vothanosho]] || [[word:vothanoko|vothanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vothanofthof|vothanofthof]] || [[word:vothanofjof|vothanofjof]] || [[word:vothanofshof|vothanofshof]] || [[word:vothanofkof|vothanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vothanïfthïf|vothanïfthïf]] || [[word:vothanïfjïf|vothanïfjïf]] || [[word:vothanïfshïf|vothanïfshïf]] || [[word:vothanïfkïf|vothanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vothanïfthïfthïf|vothanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:vothanïfjïfjïf|vothanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:vothanïfshïfshïf|vothanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:vothanïfkïfkïf|vothanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vothanïfthïf|vothanïfthïf]] || [[word:vothanïfjïf|vothanïfjïf]] || [[word:vothanïfshïf|vothanïfshïf]] || [[word:vothanïfkïf|vothanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vothanïfthïf|vothanïfthïf]] || [[word:vothanïfjïf|vothanïfjïf]] || [[word:vothanïfshïf|vothanïfshïf]] || [[word:vothanïfkïf|vothanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vothanæthæ|vothanæthæ]] || [[word:vothanæjæ|vothanæjæ]] || [[word:vothanæshæ|vothanæshæ]] || [[word:vothanækæ|vothanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vothanathatha|vothanathatha]] || [[word:vothanajaja|vothanajaja]] || [[word:vothanashasha|vothanashasha]] || [[word:vothanakaka|vothanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vothanatha|vothanatha]] || [[word:vothanaja|vothanaja]] || [[word:vothanasha|vothanasha]] || [[word:vothanaka|vothanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vothanafthaf|vothanafthaf]] || [[word:vothanafjaf|vothanafjaf]] || [[word:vothanafshaf|vothanafshaf]] || [[word:vothanafkaf|vothanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vothanasha|vothanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vothanshësha|vothanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vothanrosha|vothanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vothanmusha|vothanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vothanyasha|vothanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govothankshësha|govothankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govothankrosha|govothankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govothankmusha|govothankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govothankyasha|govothankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vothathanasha|vothathanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vothathanshësha|vothathanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vothathanrosha|vothathanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vothathanmusha|vothathanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vothathanyasha|vothathanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govothathankshësha|govothathankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govothathankrosha|govothathankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govothathankmusha|govothathankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govothathankyasha|govothathankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vethænasha|vethænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vethænshësha|vethænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vethænrosha|vethænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vethænmusha|vethænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vethænyasha|vethænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govethænkshësha|govethænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govethænkrosha|govethænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govethænkmusha|govethænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govethænkyasha|govethænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vothfanasha|vothfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vothfanshësha|vothfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vothfanrosha|vothfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vothfanmusha|vothfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vothfanyasha|vothfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govothfankshësha|govothfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govothfankrosha|govothfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govothfankmusha|govothfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govothfankyasha|govothfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
